<strong style="font-weight: 700; font-size: 2.5em;">Z-GRC Engine</strong>

<strong style="font-weight: 400; font-size: 1.5em;">Governance, Risk, Compliance Engine developed by [zeb Labs](https://zeblab.zeb.co/)</strong>

## Welcome to Z-GRC Documentation

Z-GRC is a powerful Python package designed to streamline Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC) operations. Built by zeb Labs, this engine provides a comprehensive suite of tools for managing compliance frameworks, risk assessments, and governance workflows.

## Key Features

- **Flexible Integration**: Seamlessly works with both AWS Bedrock (via boto3) and Claude Code, adapting to your infrastructure
- **Effortless Deployment**: Zero complexity setup - configure once, integrate anywhere in your application with minimal overhead
- **Unified Control Center**: Centralized dashboard for configuration management, real-time monitoring, and comprehensive audit logging
- **All in One Place**: Both governance and obserability achieved using single framework

!!! success "Industry First"
    **The first open source GRC framework enabling enterprise grade governance and compliance controls for Claude Code, without requiring an enterprise subscription.**

## Support & Community

- **GitHub**: [zeb-ai/z-grc](https://github.com/zeb-ai/z-grc)
- **PyPI**: [z-grc](https://pypi.org/project/z-grc/)
- **Issues**: Report bugs and request features on our [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/zeb-ai/z-grc/issues)
